title: Meridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its Finest
bodyHtml:
Meridian Ellipse: Streaming Audio At Its Finest

Elegant, simple, and powerful—the Meridian Ellipse is the latest evolution of high-performance all-in-one streaming speakers.

Designed for exceptional sound quality, Ellipse delivers room-filling, lifelike audio in a beautifully compact form.

‍

‍

‍

A Complete Meridian System in a Single Speaker

Ellipse is the third loudspeaker to emerge from Meridian’s Extreme Engineering Programme, representing a distillation of everything Meridian does best. Despite its sleek and compact design, Ellipse produces deep bass and clear, authoritative projection, typically found in much larger speakers.

Crafted in Britain with state-of-the-art components and meticulous attention to detail, Ellipse is designed for pure music enjoyment—bringing Meridian’s signature sound quality to any space.

‍

‍

Modern, Sleek Aesthetic

Designed to complement contemporary interiors, Ellipse’s elliptical shape echoes Meridian’s design DNA, offering a smooth, pebble-like form in deep, non-reflective black. The soft-touch finish not only enhances its luxurious look but also makes it an inviting addition to any space.

‍

‍

Total Digital Connectivity & Streaming

Meridian Ellipse supports the latest streaming technologies, making it effortless to enjoy music from your preferred services. Connectivity options include:

  • AirPlay & Google Cast – Stream directly from Apple and Android devices.
  • Spotify Connect & TIDAL Connect – Native support for high-quality music streaming.
  • Roon Ready & UPnP Renderer – Perfect for audiophiles seeking a high-resolution, multi-room audio experience.
  • Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, & Ethernet – Enjoy both wireless convenience and wired stability.

‍

‍

Engineered for Uncompromising Performance

Ellipse distills the technological advancements of Meridian’s flagship DSP8000 XE and DSP9 into a compact yet powerful speaker. Key innovations include:

  • Sealed Cabinet Design – Prevents unwanted resonance for pure, distortion-free sound.
  • Advanced Bass & Space Features – Optimizes sound based on room size and placement.
  • Image Elevation Technology – Enhances sound staging for an immersive, lifelike experience.

‍

‍

Effortless Control at Your Fingertips

Designed for intuitive use, Ellipse features illuminated touch controls on the top panel for instant access to playback functions. Flexible setup options and powerful user settings allow for a personalized listening experience without complexity.

‍

‍

The Future of Streaming Audio

With cutting-edge engineering, seamless connectivity, and a refined aesthetic, the Meridian Ellipse redefines the all-in-one speaker. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or office, it delivers true Meridian performance in a speaker that is as beautiful as it is powerful.
